name: doota-workspace
//: Workspace root. No app code lives here — every deployable is under apps/ (web = SvelteKit app pkg 'doota', landing, mail-in, mail-jobs); shared libs under packages/ (@doota/db, @doota/mail-core). These scripts just orchestrate the member packages via pnpm --filter.

scripts.deploy:workers: pnpm run deploy:mail-in && pnpm run deploy:mail-jobs
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm run deploy && pnpm run deploy:workers
